sql_array: CREATE TABLE response_times (id UInt32, response_time Float32, weight UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO response_times (id, response_time, weight) VALUES (1, 200.0, 3), (2, 400.0, 5), (3, 150.0, 2);
UPDATE response_times SET weight = 4 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, quantileTimingWeighted(0.75)(response_time, weight) FROM response_times GROUP BY id;
